name: Piche Resources Limited
description: Piche Resources Limited is a junior mineral exploration company focused on the identification and development of high-quality uranium and precious metal projects. Headquartered in Perth, Western Australia, the company holds a diverse portfolio of exploration licenses, including key assets in Western Australia and Argentina. With an experienced board and management team, Piche Resources leverages historical data and advanced exploration techniques to target tier-one mineral deposits. The company is strategically positioned to meet the growing global demand for clean, emission-free energy and critical minerals through its commitment to systematic, drill-ready exploration programs.
